{{Infobox location
| name = Ashwind
| introduced = cradle-11-dreadgod
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Ashwind is a vast continent that serves as the home of [[dragons]]. Its geography spans from the [[Trackless Sea]] in the north to southern jungles, and it includes various distinct regions such as the western [[Blackflame Empire]], eastern territories formerly belonging to [[Xorrus]], and the heart of the continent, [[Moongrave]]. The land features diverse environments, including deserts and forests. Historically, the [[Blackflame]] organization and gold [[dragons]] controlled large portions of the continent. Ashwind is also home to ancient landmarks like the [[Tower of Seven Moons]], a long-standing historical monument and tourist site from the south that has endured numerous natural disasters, [[aura]]-storms, and attacks by [[Dreadgods]]. The continent is a central setting for significant conflicts involving powerful entities like the [[Silent King]], [[Malice]], and [[the Queen]] of the Ashwind Continent.}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Ashwind]] is a location containing the [[Blackflame Empire]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3">''Dreadgod'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Wandering Titan]] is on [[Ashwind]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c4">''Dreadgod'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Ashwind continent]] spreads from the [[Trackless Sea]] in the north to the jungles in the south.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c18">''Dreadgod'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Ashwind]] is a territory secured by the Arelius ancestors via a spatial tunnel.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c18">''Waybound'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Monarchs]] are looking for [[Eithan]]'s apprentices in [[Ashwind]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Ashwind]] is one of the five land masses projected by the [[Phoenix]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c25">''Waybound'', chapter 25</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Ashwind]] is a continent.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 1</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|“Your mother. She is in Serpent’s Grave, in the Blackflame Empire in Ashwind.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Regions]]
